caption: A person's hands are seen interacting with several stacked boxes of collectible cards. The boxes are white and gray with the words "CLEARLY AUTHENTIC" printed on them, along with the year "2020". The scene takes place on a black surface featuring a large orange and white logo that reads "JASPYS CASEBREAKS". In the corner of the screen, a small inset video shows a man wearing a black shirt and a black baseball cap. Throughout the sequence, the person's right hand reaches toward the boxes, shifting them slightly and pulling one partially out from the stack. Their left hand stabilizes the bottom of the pile. A smaller logo overlay in the corner repeats the text "JASPYS CASEBREAKS.COM" next to an image of a person. The movement is focused and precise as the individual handles the boxes against the branded backdrop.
